headline: Apex Machining lands $6.5M Navy IDIQ
body: Apex Machining confirmed it was awarded a $6.5M multi-year IDIQ to produce machined actuator assemblies for a Navy program, expanding its defense backlog.

headline: Furnace outage idles Titan Castings shift
body: Titan Castings furloughed a production shift this week after an unplanned furnace outage, and told customers to expect multi-week slips on titanium billet shipments.

headline: Beacon Aviation ramps on new program starts
body: Demand for Beacon Aerospace components is spiking as several new aircraft programs enter production, and the company is seeking precision-machining subcontractors to absorb overflow.

headline: Cobalt Alloys hit with source-inspection hold
body: A porosity escape on a Cobalt Alloys casting lot triggered a customer source-inspection hold, raising questions about the supplier's process controls.

headline: Chatter: Ironclad may have taken a bracket program
body: Unconfirmed industry chatter suggests Ironclad Components may have won a bracket program, though nothing has been announced and sources are hedging.

headline: Summit Turbine wins $1.1M Air Force award
body: Summit Turbine was awarded a $1.1M Air Force contract for turbine blade machining, its first federal award in the segment.

headline: Vanguard Aerospace breaks ground on new plant
body: Vanguard Aerospace announced a facility expansion to add 5-axis machining capacity, a move analysts read as a bid to win more airframe structures work.

headline: Aluminum prices climb again
body: Aluminum prices climbed for a third straight month on energy costs, pressuring margins across the machining supply base, with several shops signaling quote increases.

headline: Northwind Systems posts hiring surge
body: Northwind Systems posted a surge of engineering and supply-chain openings, a signal it is staffing up for a production ramp.

headline: New AS9100 revision affects certified shops
body: A new revision to AS9100 introduces additional process-control requirements that certified aerospace suppliers will need to demonstrate at their next audit.
